channel.title: Tobias Meixner - Blog
channel.description: Fact-based articles on server-side tracking, GTM, GA4, Consent Mode v2, Answer Engine Optimization and performance marketing. Practical knowledge from a tracking freelancer based in Würzburg, Germany.

item.title: Bypassing Safari ITP: Same-Origin sGTM for 400-Day Cookies in 2026
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: Safari ITP caps cookies at 7 days - and since Safari 16.4, even server-set ones. Complete guide to Same-Origin Path-Based sGTM with Cloudflare Worker, the IP-Matching Rule, and why CNAME cloaking is dead.

item.title: Google Ads Enhanced Conversions via Server-Side GTM: Complete 2026 Guide for 90%+ Match Rate
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: Set up Enhanced Conversions via Server-Side GTM - match rate from 60-70% to 90%+, +5-10% measured conversions, YouTube +17%. 5 steps with Conversion Linker, user-data pipeline and match rate check. Plus the most common hashing mistake.

item.title: Meta CAPI via Server-Side GTM: Complete Guide for Maximum Event Match Quality 2026
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: Set up Meta Conversions API via Server-Side GTM - deduplication via event_id, hashed PII, EMQ optimization to 8.0+ for 15-25% better attributed conversions. 5 steps with Stape, Test Events and GDPR check.

item.title: How to Set Up Stape.io in 30 Minutes: Step-by-Step Guide 2026
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: How to set up Stape.io for server-side tracking with your own subdomain - in 30 minutes. Complete guide with DNS, GTM server container, Cloudflare warnings and GDPR check.

item.title: Prompt Engineering for E-Commerce: 5 Strategies for Better AI Product Descriptions
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: Five prompt strategies (Zero-Shot, Few-Shot, Role Prompting, Constraint, Chain-of-Thought) for better AI-generated product descriptions. Based on peer-reviewed research (Chen et al. 2025; Sahoo et al. 2024; Brown et al. 2020).

item.title: Server-Side Tracking 2026: Why You're Losing 30-40% of Your Conversion Data Right Now
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: Server-side tracking captures conversion events on your own server instead of in the browser - independent of ad blockers, iOS 14.5 and Safari ITP. Standard tracking loses 30-40% of all conversions. Three implementation approaches and step-by-step setup.

item.title: Performance Max vs. Meta Advantage+: Which AI Campaign Wins in 2026?
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: Comparison of Google Performance Max and Meta Advantage+ - the two AI-driven campaign types. With ROAS benchmarks and a budget-based decision guide.

item.title: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO): How to Get Found in ChatGPT & Co. in 2026
item.dc:creator: Tobias Meixner
item.description: How websites get found in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews. Fact-based guide with concrete steps - schema, llms.txt, E-E-A-T signals, citation quality.
